hero_title: Crito Takes Your Business Calls So You Don't Have To.
hero_description: Your AI receptionist answers 24/7, speaks to every customer in a professional voice, and takes action on bookings, questions and requests — without you lifting a finger.
social_trusted_text: Trusted by service businesses across multiple industries
pain_title: Businesses lose customers every day to unanswered calls
pain_description: Missing a phone call isn't just an inconvenience — it's lost revenue, damaged reputation, and customers choosing your competitors instead.

pain_cards.heading: Missed calls mean missed revenue
pain_cards.paragraph: Customers call outside business hours, get voicemail, and book with your competitor who answers immediately.
pain_cards.btnText: 67% of calls go unanswered during peak hours

pain_cards.heading: Competitors are one call away
pain_cards.paragraph: Every unanswered call is a customer choosing someone else.
pain_cards.btnText: 85% of customers call a second business when first call goes unanswered

pain_cards.heading: Overwhelmed teams lose customers
pain_cards.paragraph: Your staff juggles walk-ins and calls — leading to mistakes.
pain_cards.btnText: 40% of callers hang up after waiting 60 seconds

product_title: A Voice Assistant Built for Your Business
product_paragraph_1: Crito AI is a voice assistant that answers your business phone and talks to customers like a real person. It checks availability, books appointments, answers common questions about your services and pricing, handles scheduling, and transfers to your team when a human touch is needed.
product_paragraph_2: Every call is recorded, transcribed, and summarized in your dashboard — with sentiment analysis, cost tracking, and full analytics. Connect to your calendar, CRM, payment systems, and business tools with ready-made integrations.
product_image_alt: Dashboard view of Crito AI showing call analytics and assistant interface
how_heading: From Setup to Success in 4 Simple Steps
how_description: No technical expertise required. Get your AI voice assistant up and running faster than you can schedule a team meeting.
how_footer: Ready in less time than it takes to make coffee

how_steps.title: Connect Your Phone Line
how_steps.description: Add your Twilio phone number and Retell agent. No hardware, no PBX changes.

how_steps.title: Configure Your Assistant
how_steps.description: Set the welcome message, business hours, operating mode, and customize instructions for your business.

how_steps.title: Go Live
how_steps.description: Your AI assistant starts answering customer calls immediately with intelligent routing and natural conversation.

how_steps.title: Track Every Call
how_steps.description: Every call is recorded, transcribed, and analyzed with full sentiment analysis and cost breakdowns.

audio_heading: Everything You Need to Delight Your Customers
audio_description: Powerful features designed for service businesses that value every customer interaction

operations.title: Smart Call Transfer
operations.description: When a customer needs a human, the AI transfers the call instantly to the right person.

operations.title: Call Logs & Recordings
operations.description: Every call logged with transcript, audio recording, AI summary, and caller sentiment.

operations.title: Post-Call Summary Emails
operations.description: Receive an email after each call with summary, sentiment, and recording link.

operations.title: Configurable Personality
operations.description: Custom welcome message, system instructions, and brand voice for your business.

customerFacing.title: 24/7 AI Receptionist
customerFacing.description: Answers every customer call instantly, even outside business hours.

customerFacing.title: Instant Appointment Booking
customerFacing.description: Lets customers book, reschedule, or cancel appointments during the call.

customerFacing.title: Smart FAQ Handling
customerFacing.description: Responds instantly to common questions like pricing, location, and services.

customerFacing.title: Lead Capture System
customerFacing.description: Collects and stores customer details from every call for follow-up.

enterprise.title: Multi-Location Control
enterprise.description: Manage all branches from one unified dashboard with full visibility.

enterprise.title: Advanced API Access
enterprise.description: Integrate deeply with your CRM, ERP, and internal systems.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Security
enterprise.description: Secure infrastructure with encryption and compliance-ready setup.

enterprise.title: Custom AI Training
enterprise.description: Train AI using your own business data for smarter responses.

industry_description: Experience how our Voice AI handles real conversations across different industries. Select an industry to explore.
industry_card_desc: Handle reservations, guest inquiries, and booking modifications 24/7 with natural conversation
chat_1: Hi, do you have any rooms available for this weekend?
chat_2: Hello! Yes, we do have rooms available for this weekend. Would you like to know about our room options and rates?
chat_4: Alright, we have several options. We have the Coral Suite at $499/night, the Azure View at $399/night, and the Starfish Room at $299/night. Which one would you like to proceed with? Let me know if you want me to repeat.
testimonial_description: See what business owners and operators are saying about their experience

testimonials.text: Crito AI has been a game-changer for our practice. We were missing so many calls during appointments, and now every patient gets an immediate response. Our booking rate has increased by 40%.
testimonials.name: Dr. Sarah Martinez

testimonials.text: The AI handles our routine inquiries flawlessly. Our team can now focus on delivering exceptional service instead of being tied to the phone all day. It's like having an extra team member.
testimonials.name: Michael Chen

testimonials.text: Managing multiple locations used to be a nightmare. With Crito AI, each location has its own assistant, and I can monitor everything from one dashboard. It's incredibly efficient.
testimonials.name: Emma Thompson

pricing_para: Choose the plan that fits your business needs
pricing_note: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
integrations_heading: We handle setup you focus on customers
integrations_para: Ready-to-use connections with the tools businesses rely on. Minimal friction, maximum capability.
integration_support_title: We provide full technical support for smooth system integration
integration_support_desc: We help your apps and tools easily work together without any complexity
faq_para: Everything you need to know about Crito AI
faq_q1: Does it sound like a real person?
faq_a1: Yes, our AI uses advanced voice technology to deliver natural, human-like conversations that feel smooth and realistic to callers.
faq_a2: Yes, the AI supports multiple languages and can adapt to your customers’ preferred language for a seamless experience.
faq_q3: Does it integrate with our existing systems?
faq_a3: Absolutely. It integrates with CRMs, calendars, and custom APIs, so it fits easily into your existing workflow.
faq_a4: Your AI continues working 24/7, answering calls, assisting customers, and booking appointments even when your team is offline.
faq_a5: Yes, you can manage multiple locations from a single dashboard with centralized control, insights, and reporting.
cta_heading: Ready to Transform Your Customer Experience?
cta_footer: No credit card required • 14-day free trial • Setup in under 1 day
footer_tagline: Voice AI assistant platform for hotels and hospitality businesses
voice_para: Listen to real conversations between customers and the AI assistant
voice_book_desc: AI checks availability, presents options, collects details with confirmation, creates booking
voice_check_desc: AI retrieves booking details and provides live status update
voice_ask_desc: AI explains available services and answers follow-up questions
